TraitDef.label: jury rigger
TraitDef.description: This pawn has a knack for improvised repairs. Right-click any damaged FCP weapon and select "Jury rig" to cannibalize a matching weapon from the map, instantly restoring condition in the field without a bench.

li.label: jury rigger
li.description: This pawn has a knack for improvised repairs. Right-click any damaged FCP weapon and select "Jury rig" to cannibalize a matching weapon from the map, instantly restoring condition in the field without a bench.
